title: alar trash
message:
1. cc the star scryers
2. kill the astro mancers
3. move out of whirlwinds

title: alar trash
message:

title: alar trash pats
message:
1. get aggro
2. drag mobs into hallway
3. ranged stack, melee stack

title: ALAR
message:
PHASE 1
1. 4 platforms, left to right 1-4, tank on edge of platforms
2. pick up adds when moved
3. MOVE DOWN for flame quills

PHASE 2
1. tank swap on melt armor
2. move out of dive bomb
3. kill adds
warning: alar can charge a random target

title: trash
message:
1. kill 1 golem before it arcane explodes
2. spell reflect or ground the overcharge

title: trash
message:
1. kill 1 golem before it arcane explodes
2. spell reflect or ground the overcharge

title: trash
message:
1. mage cc smith
2. warlocks banish mechanics
3. tank and kill golems

title: VOID REAVER
message:
1. move in together, hunters out
2. everyone stand in a stack in melee
3. heal through damage, kill
4. watch threat
warning: - he sends out an arcane volley to ANYONE not in melee range, move out of it hunters, it's big and slow

title: SOLARIAN
message:
PHASE 1
1. no threat
2. stack up in melee and ranged
3. move out of group stack whoever gets the debuff

PHASE 2
1. tank and kill her
2. kill adds
warning:
- move out of group for knock up
- kick add heals

title: trash
message:
1. kill the NETHER SCRYERS FIRST when fighting the patrolling mobs, they mc
2. pull packs together in the middle for the ones on the sides

title: trash
message:
1. SPAM sheep the centurions
2. kill the battle mages
3. kill the blood knights

title: trash
message:
1. SPAM sheep the centurions
2. move the marshal out for whirlwind
3. kill the inquisitor
4. kill knight
5. kill the centurion
6. kill the marshal

title: KAELTHAS
message:
PHASE 1
1. kite and kill thaladred to the back 
2. kill sanguinar and telonicus on the left side of the platform
3. don't get in 30 yards of capernian
4. warlock drag her a little south, get threat, then kill

PHASE 2
1. group the weapons on center platform
2. kick staff and mace
3. hunter tank bow
4. stun weapons, aoe them down
5. there is a timer on this phase
6. USE YOUR WEAPONS

PHASE 3
1. tank sanguinar and telonicus and melee kill
2. warlock tank capernian
3. have someone try to bait a conflag for positioning 
4. range kill thaladred
5. range kill capernian'

PHASE 4
1. KICK ALL CASTS
2. move out of flame runes
3. off tank pick up phoenix, ranged kill
4. all kill eggs

PHASE 5
1. move out of shadow orbs
2. don't take too much fall damage at the end
3. KICK ALL CASTS
4. move out of flame runes
5. off tank pick up phoenix, ranged kill
6. all kill eggs
warning:
- don't bear tank kael, make sure shield has him
- go slow and control the fight
